categories.name: Code
categories.description: Software development work: programming, debugging, terminals, Git, local dev tools, package managers, API clients, and technical coding websites.

categories.name: Design
categories.description: Visual and product design work: UI design, graphics, mockups, illustration, photo editing, motion design, and design systems work.

categories.name: Writing
categories.description: Writing and editing text: documents, notes, essays, specs, docs, markdown, wikis, and drafting content.

categories.name: Research
categories.description: Intentional information gathering: reading documentation, papers, tutorials, comparison pages, issue threads, and technical or non-technical investigation.

categories.name: Browsing
categories.description: General web browsing with weak intent or mixed intent: homepage surfing, random tabs, link hopping, forums, general internet use.

categories.name: Messaging
categories.description: Chat and direct communication: instant messaging, team chat, social chat, and asynchronous message threads that are not email.

categories.name: Meetings
categories.description: Live meetings and calls: video conferencing, voice calls, screen sharing, webinars, and meeting rooms.

categories.name: Email
categories.description: Email-specific work: inbox triage, reading and writing email, and mail clients or mail web apps.

categories.name: Planning
categories.description: Planning and coordination: calendar, tasks, project management boards, to-do apps, roadmaps, and scheduling.

categories.name: Gaming
categories.description: Video games, game launchers, and gameplay-related tools.

categories.name: Video
categories.description: Watching video content: streaming, recorded video, short-form video, lectures, and media players focused on video.

categories.name: Music
categories.description: Listening to music or audio streams: music players, streaming music, radio, and audio-focused media apps.

categories.name: Shopping
categories.description: Online shopping, e-commerce, product browsing for purchase, delivery tracking, and marketplace browsing.

categories.name: Finance
categories.description: Banking, payments, accounting, investing, taxes, budgeting, expense management, and financial dashboards.

categories.name: System
categories.description: Operating-system and device administration: file manager, installer dialogs, login windows, settings, permissions prompts, and system utilities.

categories.name: Miscellaneous
categories.description: Fallback category for items that do not fit the taxonomy clearly enough to classify with confidence.
